title: Malaxis latilabris
taxonomy: Malaxis latilabris is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. This species belongs to the genus Malaxis, which is a group of terrestrial orchids that are native to the Americas. Malaxis latilabris is further classified as a member of the subgenus Microstylis, which is a subgenus within the genus Malaxis. The species is also known to be closely related to other species within the Malaxis genus, such as Malaxis unifolia. Malaxis latilabris is a terrestrial orchid that grows in shaded areas with moist soil, adding to its unique characteristics.
